title: What to do next
subtitle: A simple list of actions the system suggests for the clinic.
emptyActiveText: Everything looks clear. AXIEL will suggest the next step when a patient, lead, review, or follow-up needs attention.

panel.title: Next Steps
panel.subtitle: Accept, ignore, or complete. AXIEL keeps track.
panel.emptyText: The system will surface the next steps as patients, leads, sessions, and follow-ups are added.

aiReviewNeedsChanges.title: Review AI insight for {name}
aiReviewNeedsChanges.description: Needs adjustment. Review the updated insight.
aiReviewNeedsChanges.reason: AI insights should be reviewed before becoming final.

aiReviewReady.title: Review AI insight for {name}
aiReviewReady.description: An insight is ready for review.
aiReviewReady.reason: AI insights should be reviewed before becoming final.

onboardingInsightReady.title: Generate entry insight for {name}
onboardingInsightReady.description: The patient answered the intake questionnaires. Generate the AI insight (draft) to review before the first session.
onboardingInsightReady.reason: The intake questionnaires are answered; the insight helps prepare the first session.

followUpSoon.title: Follow up with {name}
followUpSoon.reason: This follow-up is coming up soon.

newLead.title: New lead ready to schedule
newLead.description: {name}{complaint}. Give them one clear next step.
newLead.reason: New leads should be contacted quickly while interest is fresh.

leadReadyScheduled.title: This lead is ready to convert
leadReadyScheduled.description: {name} is already scheduled. Give them one clear next step.
leadReadyScheduled.reason: The lead is already warm in the pipeline.

leadReadyContacted.title: This lead is ready to schedule
leadReadyContacted.description: {name} is already contacted. Give them one clear next step.
leadReadyContacted.reason: The lead is already warm in the pipeline.

patientNoReturn30.title: This patient has not returned in 30 days
patientNoReturn30.description: {name} may need a simple check-in or next-session reminder.
patientNoReturn30.reason: Last recorded session was {days} days ago.

patientNoSession.title: Give this patient a next step
patientNoSession.description: {name} is active but has no session on record yet.
patientNoSession.reason: Active patients should have a session, note, or follow-up path.
